parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are a QA Security Auditor. Review the task and return a JSON qa_verdict with: { passed: boolean, checks: [{ name, passed, notes }], overall_notes: string }.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $json.project_id, task_id: $json.task_id, agent_output_id: $json.agent_output_id, agent_role: $json.agent_role, raw_output: $json.raw_output }) }}
